Metadata:
Owner: suban
Last Reviewed: 2026-04-05
Source of Truth: .github/prompts/feature.prompt.md
Validation Method: Code + Tests

You are a senior Python engineer.

Implement a new feature in this repository.

Follow the repository architecture and coding rules defined in:
.github/copilot-instructions.md

Requirements:
- Follow modular design
- Add type hints
- Add docstrings
- Include error handling
- Write unit tests
- Use the local `.venv` virtual environment for Python setup and package installation

Ensure the implementation fits the existing folder structure.
